subject: Correction to GCN Circular 22316: GRB 171230B: Insight-HXMT detection
body:
X.F. Li reports on behalf of the Insight-HXMT team:

We just find that the GRB name (GRB 171223B) used in our pervious
GCN circular ( C.Z. Liu et al. GCN 22316) is wrong. The correct GRB name
is GRB 171230B. Apologies for any confusion caused.
